description: Rules based on logging frequency and consistency as a proxy for user wellbeing

rules.title: You've been quiet
rules.message: You've been quiet this week. Even a 10-second check-in helps build the picture.

rules.title: Low activity this week
rules.message: Only a couple of logs this week. Consistency helps us give you better insights.

rules.title: High logging volume
rules.message: You're logging a lot. That's great for data — make sure it's not becoming a source of stress itself.

rules.title: No mood check-ins
rules.message: No mood check-ins this week. Without them, we can't connect the dots between stress, relief, and how you feel.

rules.title: Solid consistency
rules.message: Solid consistency this week. Your data is painting a clear picture.
